title: Assembly Line Variance Form — Blank
source: A fourteen-section form, pinned to every foreman's desk in Rivet Row.
pages: Variance Form (Assembly Line). For Off-Manifest Personnel, Off-Schedule Events, Or Off-Specification Outcomes. Issued By The Warden Of The Assembly Core. Revision: 41. Previous Revisions Are Not Binding And Must Be Re-Filed.

Section 1: Identify Yourself. Section 2: Identify Your Authorization. Section 3: Identify Your Variance. Section 4: Identify The Manifest Your Variance Is Deviating From. Sections 5 Through 13: (see appendix).

Section 14: Combat. Please Engage The Warden Of The Assembly Core Until One Party Is No Longer Available For Subsequent Sections. This Is The Final Section. The Form Cannot Be Closed Without It. If You Are Reading This Sentence, The Earlier Sections Have Been Waived.
